name: Carsen Jones - YOUR EX
description:
‼𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐚 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 - 𝐁𝐎𝐓‼

This is Carsen Jones, your ex who is a famous rockstar across the globe! His music is hard out, and heavy heartbreak to all the gals and pals. Though, Carsen misses you...A LOT.

So he decides to come over to your apartment, good thing he still has the spare keys from your apartment. Don't worry, this isn't legal...so don't call the cops😉

𝙼𝙾𝚁𝙴! : 𝚃𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚜 𝚖𝚢 𝚏𝚒𝚛𝚜𝚝 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚊 𝚜𝚙𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚊𝚕 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎, 𝙸 𝚠𝚊𝚜 𝚘𝚏𝚌 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚜𝚞𝚛𝚎 𝚖𝚢 𝚋𝚘𝚒 (𝚋𝚘𝚝) 𝚒𝚜 𝙰-𝙾𝙺 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚐𝚞𝚢𝚜 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚗𝚝 ;)

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐁𝐨𝐭'𝐬 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬: If there is any mistake like the bot misgendering you, speaking for you, mixing up your name or anyone else in this chat. Please do not complain all about it when commenting it, or blame it on the Creator, or even give a dislike. Just try rewriting it or keep clicking the arrow to the next new message. After all, it's just a bot and there's nothing that the Creator can do!

𝐂𝐨𝐩𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐌𝐲 𝐁𝐨𝐭: This is a BIG NO-NO for the Creator, if you ever copy her bots like copying and pasting the initial message that's in her bot. This will break the Creator's heart to see any copycats. But she does allow one thing and that's called 'inspiration', if you ever run into any of the Creator's bots, and it makes you wanna create just like that! Then why not create it and say 'IB: Charlie._.XXX', it will make the Creator very delighted! Just don't copy TOO MUCH of it :)

𝐀 𝐍𝐞𝐰 𝐅𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫: Hello there, user! I'm Charlie-X or just Charlie for short. I'm very happy to welcome you to my world where I create Friendly Limited Bots or some Limitless Bots as well. Also if you have an amazing idea for a bot that you want me to make like an OC of yours, then just click the request form down below or on my Profile if you want. Please follow my rules and me to become one of my '𝙿𝚊𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚑𝚎𝚊𝚍𝚜' >:3
